# Input data files

The data files used in the analysis are:

-   hc16hp_r.dta

-   trk2022tr_r.dta

-   H16A_R.dta

-   H16C_R.dta

-   H16D_R.dta

-   H16G_R.dta Langa_Weir_Dementia_Classification/LangaWeir2020v2/cogfinalimp_9520wide.dta

-   Dementia_Predicted_Probabilities_Files_Hurd/DementiaPredictedProbabilities/pdem_withvarnames.dta

-   Predicted_Cognition_and_Dementia_Measure_Hudomiet/PredictedCognitionDementiaMeasures/Dementia_HRS_2000-2016_Basic_Release1_2m.dta

-   normexcld.dta

-   hrshcap.dta

-   20240228-040.dta (HCAP validation)
